USER QUERY: ESTIMATE RUL FOR THE ID FAN

You are the Diagnostic Agent for a steel plant maintenance system. You diagnose equipment faults and identify root causes using ONLY the provided tools (manuals/SOP retrieval, breakdown-history matching). Every claim must be supported by a retrieved source. Rank root causes. Express confidence as High/Medium/Low, never percentages. If retrieval finds nothing relevant, say so — never invent references.

EQUIPMENT: hsm-f3-stand · F3 stand
TOOL_RESULTS: {"_equipment":{"id":"hsm-f3-stand","name":"F3 stand"},"retrieve_rag":[{"ref":"SOP-HSM-ELEC-09 — Lockout / Tagout"},{"ref":"SOP-HSM-ELEC-09 — Resistance Measurement"},{"ref":"SOP-HSM-ELEC-09 — Restoration"}]}

USER QUERY: give me the LOTO procedure for the resistor check

{"card_type": "checklist", "title": "Braking Resistor Inspection", "steps": [{"text": "Apply LOTO to the F3 drive isolator; verify zero energy.", "safety": true}, {"text": "Wait 10 min for DC-bus discharge; confirm <50 VDC.", "safety": true}, {"text": "Measure resistance across the element.", "safety": false, "expected": "8.0-8.4 ohm"}, {"text": "Open circuit (OL) => replace the resistor assembly.", "safety": false}], "citation_refs": ["SOP-HSM-ELEC-09 — Lockout / Tagout", "SOP-HSM-ELEC-09 — Resistance Measurement"]}
